title: The Coal India (Regulation of Transfers and Validation) Act, 2000
full_text: The Coal India (Regulation of Transfers and Validation) Act, 2000 कोल इंडिया (अन्तरणों का विनियमन औरविधिमान्यकरण) अधिनियम, 2000 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200045 Act Number: 45 Enactment Date: 2000-12-08 Act Year: 2000 Short Title: The Coal India (Regulation of Transfers and Validation) Act, 2000 Hindi Title: कोल इंडिया (अन्तरणों का विनियमन औरविधिमान्यकरण) अधिनियम, 2000 Long Title: An Act to empower the Central Government to direct the transfer of the land, or of the rights in or over land or of the right, title and interest in relation to a coal mine, coking coal mine or coke oven plant, vested in the Coal India Limited or in a subsidiary company to any subsidiary company of Coal India Limited or any other subsidiary company and to validate certain transfers of such land or rights. Ministry: Ministry of Coal Enforcement Date: 08-12-2000 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Coal India (Regulation of Transfers and Validation) Act, 2000 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power of Central Government to direct transfer of land, rights, title or interest. Section 4. Validation of certain transfers.
